messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao on-premises. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Synapse -> OCI Data Warehouse

### Mapeamento

| Azure Synapse | OCI |
|--------------|-----|
| Synapse SQL Pool | Autonomous Data Warehouse (ADW) |
| Spark Pools | Spark on OCI |
| Synapse Pipelines | Data Integration |

### ADW Features

- Oracle SQL analytics
- In-memory processing
- Result cache
- Autonomous (auto-patching, auto-tuning)

### Consideracoes

- SQL dialect: T-SQL vs PL/SQL
- Migrar queries para Oracle syntax
- Considerar OAC para visualization

### Alternative

- **Snowflake**: Multi-cloud data warehouse
- **Databricks**: Spark-based analytics
- **ClickHouse**: Columnar DB
